Millionaire status isn’t rare anymore

In 2026, around 23.8 million Americans have a net worth above $1 million. That means the U.S. holds nearly 40% of the world’s millionaires.

The world ignored a genius.

In 2007, a man played violin for 45 minutes in a busy Washington D.C. subway station. Over 1,000 people walked by. Only seven stopped, and he made $32.
